record.field: UAE - Cost Sheet Change Processed Notification Email
Cost Sheet Changed - Ready for Finance Approval

Dear Finance Manager السيد المدير المالي,

We require your review / approval for the changes done to the below cost sheet:

Info

  • CostSheet No:${object.number}
  • CostSheet Name:${object.name}
  • Customer Name:${object.od_customer_id.name}
  • Opportunity Name:${object.lead_id.name}
  • Opportunity Number:${object.lead_id.od_number}
  • link:https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.cost.sheet&menu_id=791&action=1012

Thank You
KSA - Cost Sheet Change Processed Notification Email
Cost Sheet Changed - Ready for Finance Approval

Dear Finance Manager السيد المدير المالي,

We require your review / approval for the changes done to the below cost sheet:

Info

  • CostSheet No:${object.number}
  • CostSheet Name:${object.name}
  • Customer Name:${object.od_customer_id.name}
  • Opportunity Name:${object.lead_id.name}
  • Opportunity Number:${object.lead_id.od_number}
  • link:https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.cost.sheet&menu_id=791&action=1012

Thank You
UAE - Cost Sheet PO Available Notification Email

Dear ${object.reviewed_id.name},

Customer PO Status changed from Waiting PO to Available for the below cost sheet:

Kindly check Documents Tab for attached PO.

Info

  • CostSheet No:${object.number}
  • CostSheet Name:${object.name}
  • Customer Name:${object.od_customer_id.name}
  • Opportunity Name:${object.lead_id.name}
  • Opportunity Number:${object.lead_id.od_number}
  • link:https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.cost.sheet&menu_id=791&action=1012

Thank You
UAE - Cost Sheet PO Available Notification Email

Dear ${object.reviewed_id.name},

Customer PO Status changed from Waiting PO to Available for the below cost sheet:

Kindly check Documents Tab for attached PO.

Info

  • CostSheet No:${object.number}
  • CostSheet Name:${object.name}
  • Customer Name:${object.od_customer_id.name}
  • Opportunity Name:${object.lead_id.name}
  • Opportunity Number:${object.lead_id.od_number}
  • link:https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.cost.sheet&menu_id=791&action=1012

Thank You
Cost Sheet Hand-over Mail UAE After Project Return
Cost Sheet Handed Over أعمال جديدة

Dear ${object.reviewed_id.name or ''},

The Returned Cost Sheet is Handed over again by Sales Team, Please Check It

Info

  • CostSheet No:${object.number}
  • CostSheet Name:${object.name}
  • Customer Name:${object.od_customer_id.name}
  • Opportunity Name:${object.lead_id.name}
  • Opportunity Number:${object.lead_id.od_number}
  • link:https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.cost.sheet&menu_id=791&action=1012

Thank You
Cost Sheet Hand-over Mail Saudi After Project Return
Cost Sheet Handed Over أعمال جديدة

Dear ${object.reviewed_id.name or ''},

The Returned Cost Sheet is Handed over again by Sales Team, Please Check It

Info

  • CostSheet No:${object.number}
  • CostSheet Name:${object.name}
  • Customer Name:${object.od_customer_id.name}
  • Opportunity Name:${object.lead_id.name}
  • Opportunity Number:${object.lead_id.od_number}
  • link:https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.cost.sheet&menu_id=791&action=1012

Thank You
